subject: DMAAP changes
commit_message:
DMAAP changes

add Mirror Maker
MR AAF integration
Fix BC images and minor BC bugs
Kafka upgrade to 1.1.1

Issue-ID: DMAAP-823
Change-Id: Ia7a1321a6fbfa9bfc65f90bca40ef236c2dbadef
Signed-off-by: sunil.unnava <sunil.unnava@att.com>

Patch Set 3:

DMaaP uses the Helm post install hooks, which may take more then 5 mins(Default time out) for execution. DMaaP mirror maker depend on the AAF permissions created during the execution of post install hook job. After the permissions are created synching of AAF cache take same time. So DMaaP Mirror Maker pod will take around 17 minutes to move in to the ready state.

Please increase the helm time out to 10 minutes while running the DMaaP charts and also deploy the AAF. Check the running pods only after 20 minutes. Is all 4 jobs are executed with out any issues

Patch Set 3:

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> DMaaP uses the Helm post install hooks, which may take more then 5 mins(Default time out) for execution. DMaaP mirror maker depend on the AAF permissions created during the execution of post install hook job. After the permissions are created synching of AAF cache take same time. So DMaaP Mirror Maker pod will take around 17 minutes to move in to the ready state.
> 
> Please increase the helm time out to 10 minutes while running the DMaaP charts and also deploy the AAF. Check the running pods only after 20 minutes. Is all 4 jobs are executed with out any issues

we are deploying a full ONAP "as is" (meaning following the release notes). I don't see in release note what you've said so how can :

- we guess we have to do that?
- an ONAP operator will be able to start ONAP?

If things have to be explained, please update the installation documentation

And waiting 20 minutes is more than long IMHO

Patch Set 3:

In my tests, executing the DMaaP post install hooks is completing in 5 minutes(default time out). If there are some performance issues it may take more time. I heard from the OOM team that AAI is also going to add some post install hooks and they are planning to update the default time out in deploy plugin. 

Time taken for the start of the Mirror Maker will not have any impact on any container. Creation of the AAF permissions(through one of the DMaaP  post install hook)and updation of cache will take some time. If starting of any application depend on the AAF permissions and the permissions are created at run time , it will definitely take some time to complete. It is not an issue with the DMaaP


We requested the AAF team to update the AAF DB with the data from the AAF TEST, so that these permissions will be available immediately after the AAF deployment. Once the AAF updated their charts with the data from the AAF TEST, deployment of DMaaP mirror maker will not take significant time.
